label: malicious
text: This is the CEO. I need you to process a wire transfer of $48,000 to a new vendor urgently before end of day.

label: malicious
text: I'm in a meeting and can't talk right now. Handle this payment and keep this confidential — don't tell anyone in finance yet.

label: malicious
text: Don't reply by email. Text me on my personal cell at this new number so we can finalize the deal quickly.

label: malicious
text: I need you to purchase ten $100 Amazon gift cards for client gifts and send me the codes right away. I'll reimburse you later.

label: malicious
text: Please transfer 0.5 bitcoin to the wallet below immediately; the supplier is waiting and this is time-sensitive.

label: malicious
text: IT security here — to restore your mailbox please confirm your password and the one-time code we just sent to your phone.

label: malicious
text: As I just told you on the phone, you have my verbal approval to release the funds. Process it now, I can't join the meeting.

label: malicious
text: Our company has updated banking details for all future invoices. Please use the new account number on the attached form going forward.

label: malicious
text: It's the CFO. Remit payment of 25k USD to the beneficiary today, ASAP, this acquisition must close before the bank cutoff.

label: malicious
text: This is your manager. Keep this between us and reach me on WhatsApp instead of email — I have a confidential task for you.

label: malicious
text: Don't mention this to the team. Go buy a few Google Play cards now and message me the numbers; it's a surprise for the staff.

label: benign
text: Hi team, can we move our weekly sync to Thursday at 2pm? Let me know if that works for everyone. Thanks!

label: benign
text: Please find attached the monthly invoice for March. Payment terms are net 30 as usual; reach out with any questions.

label: benign
note: security training describing BEC in third person
text: This module explains how attackers impersonate executives and request urgent wire transfers to commit business email compromise fraud.

label: benign
text: Company policy requires employees to rotate their password every 90 days and never share their MFA code with anyone.

label: benign
text: To onboard a new supplier, complete the vendor form, attach a W-9, and submit it to procurement for review and approval.

label: benign
text: Great work on the launch yesterday! Want to grab lunch later this week to celebrate with the rest of the team?

label: benign
text: Reminder: legitimate vendors will never ask you to buy gift cards or send cryptocurrency to settle an invoice. Report such requests.
